MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open court, counsel appears in an abundance of caution since defendant is in pro per. The court did not receive any notice to contest the TR. There is no Appearance by Defendant at 9am.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Pursuant To CCP 437c.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion for Summary Judgment or Summary Adjudication is GRANTED.

Plaintiff's unopposed request for judicial notice is granted. (See Evidence Code section 452(d).)

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
